artPrompt: A cheerful human organizer mid-motion behind a folding table, arms spread over casseroles and a covered dish, a faint green-and-white voter sprite rising from the steam at the table's edge. Golden light pools across the ivory cloth, picket fences and a bullhorn dissolving into washes behind. All warm gesture and bustle, suggestion over detail. Wholesome organizing energy, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Snack Table Coordinator
text:
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (Snacks bring out the vote.)
{1}, {T}: You gain 2 life.
flavorText: Rule one of organizing: feed the volunteers. Rule two: hide the good snacks from Dale.
